strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, including modern frameworks like Nest.js and Vitest
Proven expertise in AI agent infrastructure and developer tooling, demonstrating adaptability to emerging technologies
Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail, with a history of optimizing performance and scalability in high-traffic systems
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services in recent roles, though prior exposure exists
Primary focus on AI-agent infrastructure may divert too much attention from core full-stack responsibilities
Role transitions (e.g., re:cinq) are very recent, leaving limited insight into long-term stability or impact
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills with a deep understanding of TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside valuable experience in AI agent infrastructure. His background includes optimizing high-traffic systems and contributing to open-source projects, though recent role changes introduce minor uncertainty about long-term fit. His problem-solving focus and adaptability align well with the role's requirements.
